nodes.name: New Trip Email
nodes.notes: Polls every minute for unread STR trip emails (New, Modified, Cancelled). Requires Microsoft Outlook OAuth2 credential.

nodes.name: Split Email List
nodes.notes: Dedup safety net — skips emails already processed using workflow static data

nodes.name: Log Email Details
nodes.notes: Parses request type (New/Modified/Cancelled), Confirm ID, and Trip Code from subject

nodes.name: Skip PDF?
nodes.notes: Routes Cancelled and Follow-up emails to minimal row path (no PDF processing). New/Modified continue to full pipeline.

nodes.name: Format Minimal Row
nodes.notes: Builds minimal sheet row for Cancelled/Follow-up: Confirm ID, Trip Code, requestType, and email received timestamp.

nodes.name: Get Email Attachments
nodes.notes: Fetches all attachments for this email from Microsoft Graph

nodes.name: Split Attachments
nodes.notes: Splits the Graph API attachment array into individual items

nodes.name: Filter Securedoc
nodes.notes: Keeps only the securedoc HTML attachment. If none found, downstream nodes are skipped.

nodes.name: Set Attachment Info
nodes.notes: Restructures output with messageId, emailSubject, receivedDateTime from email + attachment details

nodes.name: Send to Render Processor
nodes.notes: Sends messageId + attachmentId to Render. Processor fetches HTML, runs Puppeteer, extracts PDF fields, uploads to Drive.

nodes.name: Processing OK?
nodes.notes: Checks if the Render processor returned success

nodes.name: Log Trip Fields
nodes.notes: Shows extracted trip data: Confirm ID, Trip Code, destination, school, dates, student count

nodes.name: Format Sheet Row
nodes.notes: Builds single row with students as comma-separated arrays (columns R-U)

nodes.name: Write to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends one row per trip to trip_details tab

nodes.name: Mark Processed
nodes.notes: Stores processed messageId in workflow static data to prevent re-processing

nodes.name: Processing Failed
nodes.notes: Logs error details when the Render processor fails. Email stays unread for retry.
